When close enough a second 2LP or 5LP can be added. Damage is then 1130/1230.
Other light starters work as well
Ending in 623HK purely for damage still gives good oki in the corner. If you want to spend super 236LP/236PP allow cancels into SA3 and 236PP allows cancels into SA2.
Simple counter hit combo from overhead. Also works with 5LP when close enough but 2LP is more consistent.
Seems like the optimal meterless midscreen punish using 2HP
Sideswap. Link with the 5MP is easier and works at all ranges. At longer ranges the 2HP whiffs
Holding forward removes sideswap and gives extra damage. Same combo as before. Less drive efficient.
